title: Heltec V3 WiFi backhaul border router
description: Implement WiFi station mode, upstream IPv6 prefix, RPL root, and bridging for Heltec WiFi LoRa 32 V3 as 6LBR. Break into issues for Kconfig, main.c init, RPL integration, testing. Parent of project-LICHEN-79pj.
close_reason: Broke epic into 4 child tasks (Kconfig, main.c WiFi init, RPL prefix integration, testing). Added prefix delegation log stub in gateway main.c for Heltec V3 6LBR. Committed as project-LICHEN-sl32: fix. Pushed. Children remain open for full implementation.
